notes: This file adds review overrides for detector_model/video_data. Files not listed here are exported library clips expected to contain one golf swing.
source_time_scale is inferred by detector_workbench/validation/evaluate_detector_video_data.py from clip duration unless explicitly overridden.
swingcoach_009_dtl_20260401_143143.mp4 was manually reviewed and contains a golfer standing while a foreground person gestures near the camera, not a swing.

videos.notes: Negative clip: no swing motion by the golfer; foreground occluder/gesture should not be detected as a swing.
